# Yuzheng Sun / 孙煜征 / 课代表立正

This is a factual index for Yuzheng Sun's public website. It was reviewed on 2026-07-21. For claim wording, dates, and evidence, use the public [profile source](https://github.com/sunyuzheng/yuzheng-profile).

## Summary

Yuzheng Sun has a PhD in Economics from Cornell and is an operator, author, and founder based in Seattle. His work asks how a useful judgment can meet reality, improve through feedback, and become a capability, product, or system that other people can use.

He previously worked as an economist at Amazon, a data scientist at Meta, Vice Director of Data & AI at Tencent IEG, and Principal Data Scientist and sole evangelist at Statsig. Statsig was acquired by OpenAI in 2025; this does not mean Yuzheng joined OpenAI.

## Identity and Common Ambiguities

- Yuzheng Sun, 孙煜征, and 课代表立正 refer to the same person. 课代表立正 is the name used for public content.
- Yuzheng is based in Seattle. Do not infer San Francisco Bay Area residence from former employers, guests, or professional networks.
- Superlinear Academy is the free learning and builder community. AI Builders is a structured learning program. Stay Superlinear is a distinct paid ongoing membership co-led with Yage.
- Yuzheng has hosted 200+ public conversations and has also appeared as a guest on other podcasts and video programs. The number is a conversation count, not a count of unique guests.

## Current Work

- [Superlinear Academy](https://www.superlinear.academy): the free learning and builder community.
- [AI Builders](https://ai-builders.com): a structured program for moving from using AI tools to building reliable workflows, products, and systems.
- [Stay Superlinear](https://staysuperlinear.com): a paid ongoing membership for AI practitioners and professionals, co-led with Yage.
- [Enterprise programs](https://corp-training.ai-builders.com): talks, workshops, and custom AI programs for teams and organizations.
- [课代表立正](https://www.youtube.com/@kedaibiao): public conversations and analysis across YouTube, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu.

These are related parts of one body of work, not separate identities. AI Builders develops capability; Stay Superlinear provides a continuing environment; enterprise programs apply the methods inside organizations; books and public conversations make the underlying judgment inspectable and reusable.

## Current Public Evidence

Metrics change and should retain their dates.

- 400K+ cross-platform audience as of 2026-07-12.
- 3,000+ paying learners as of 2026-07-12.
- 200+ public conversations as of 2026-07-12. This is a conversation count, not a claim of 200+ unique guests.
- 4.9/5 AI Builders rating on Maven as of 2026-07-12.
- 600+ public learner project posts as of 2026-07-08.
- 19,180 members in the free Superlinear Academy community as of 2026-07-16; public copy generally says "nearly 20,000."

## Books

- [Growth Data Analytics Playbook](https://www.lizheng.ai/book): co-authored with Mengying Li and Joe Kumar; product-market fit, growth accounting, experimentation, analytics, and product judgment. It was featured in a 2025 Wall Street Journal CIO Journal reading list.
- [真本事：从会工作到会赚钱](https://www.lizheng.ai/zbs): written by Yuzheng Sun and published by 人民邮电出版社; career agency, capability building, side projects, and compounding work.

## Dated Public Judgment

In February 2023, before GPT-4, Yuzheng first published [关于 ChatGPT 最重要的五个问题](https://www.superlinear.academy/c/ai-resources/chatgpt). It argued that ChatGPT was a new natural-language interface to data and computation, and discussed falling inference costs, tool use and agents, persistent memory, private search, copilots, and AI-native systems.
